description: Sweep visible 'OpenCode' strings to 'OpenCMS' across CLI/TUI, i18n, server OpenAPI, SDK regen, install scripts, and templates/prompts. Preserve all programmatic identifiers and OpenCode Zen sub-brand. Land via test branch + fetch-back to main.

activities.title: Rebrand TUI + install surfaces
activities.description: Batch 1: install.sh, scripts/install/install, packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/tui/* user-visible strings.

activities.title: Rebrand i18n bundles
activities.description: Batch 2a: packages/app/src/i18n/*.ts — 16 locales, ~240 string swaps, preserve 'OpenCode Zen'.

activities.title: Rebrand server OpenAPI + regen SDKs
activities.description: Batch 3: packages/opencode/src/server/routes/*.ts descriptions; regen packages/sdk/js/openapi.json + sdk.gen.ts + packages/sdk/openapi.json.

activities.title: Rebrand templates and prompts
activities.description: Batch 6: templates/system/*, CONFIG-README, skill SKILL.md, prompt files.

activities.title: Validate and merge to main
activities.description: Run bun turbo typecheck on test/rebrand-opencms; confirm parity with pre-merge main baseline (pre-existing SST + compaction.ts errors only); merge commit 6c66af0fd.
